products.name: Tangie Candie
products.description:
"Tangie Candie is a flavorful and potent Hybrid strain cross of Tangerine Cookies and Runtz. This strain is a crowd-pleaser, with a delicious, citrusy flavor profile and a well-balanced high that is sure to satisfy both novice and experienced cannabis users.

The aroma of Tangie Candie is fruity and citrusy, with notes of tangerine and a hint of cookie dough. The flavor is just as impressive, with a smooth and creamy smoke that delivers a delicious mix of sweet and tangy flavors.

Expect to feel uplifted, giggly and talkative effects - making it a great choice for any time of day.  Other Info: CBD:THC Ratio: 1:1000 Dose Unit: 10 mg Total Doses Available: 10 Green Dragon pre-roll joints are approved for smoking route of administration. Each package is individually labeled to show the amount of active ingredients which ranges based on flower potency. The average dose for this product is 5mg, 2 times per day. Based on the average dose a 30-day supply is $18, a 50-day supply is $30, and a 70-day supply is $42. These figures are based only on average doses and may not be applicable to all patients. products.name: Blue Lemoon
products.description:
Everyday Rx "Blue Lemoon"  is a curated collection of premium, limited-reserve flower products designed for cannabis connoisseurs seeking an extraordinary experience. Produced by industry experts in state-of-the-art facilities, our flower is cultivated with care and hand trimmed to deliver vibrant terpenes and potent cannabinoids. Our flower features only the finest buds, hand selected by our cultivators, to ensure the ultimate quality, freshness, and consistency. Everyday Rx brings you the best, because everyday should be exceptional.


___

products.description:
Circles reminds you to enjoy the little things in life by bringing you quality cannabis at the best value. Our flower features the same premium indoor-grown buds, just in smaller sizes to help you save big on your favorite strains. We’re all about elevating the good vibes and expanding our circle to make cannabis accessible to everyone. Because everyone, everywhere should feel comfortable consuming a little green without breaking the bank.

products.name: Coco-Nutty #2
products.description:
Coco-Nutty, a strain cross between Tihiti Lime x White Truffles, offers aromas that intertwine nuts, tree fruit, zesty lime, and a hint of skunkiness. This strain's effects gently cradle you in a state of relaxation, luring tension away and replacing it with tranquility. As the relaxation deepens, a tingly sensation enhances the experience, complemented by an alluring touch of arousal. Coco-Nutty harmoniously balances its aromatic profile with its soothing and arousing effects, making it a versatile choice for moments of intimate connection and unwinding.

products.name: Blitzed Live Wax
products.description: Blitzed Live Wax, derived from a hybrid cross of C4 and White Truffles, offers a harmonious balance of Sativa and Indica genetics suitable for any time of day. With its earthy, skunky aroma, Blitzed provides a smooth inhale and a spicy, peppery flavor upon exhale. As a live wax, it stands out for its purity, potency, and flavor, crafted from freshly harvested cannabis plants flash-frozen to capture the essence of the plant. This concentrate is designed for experienced users seeking a powerful and aromatic cannabis experience.

products.name: Tropic Thunder AIO
products.description:
"Your daily dose of dopamine. Tropic Thunder is a zesty sativa that brings the storm—bursting with juicy mango, tangy pineapple, and a flash of citrus lightning that hits like a fruit-forward flavor bomb. It’s tropical chaos in the best way possible.

The high? All systems go. Expect an energetic, feel-good lift with just enough mental mayhem to keep things interesting. Perfect for powering through to-do lists, chasing creative sparks, or hyping yourself up for absolutely nothing.

Bold flavor, thunderstruck feels."

products.name: Pineapple Pop AIO
products.description:
"Your tropical wake-up call. Pineapple Pop is a punchy sativa that brings major island vibes—zesty pineapple, fizzy citrus, and a pop of sweet candy tang that tastes like vacation in a vape. It’s fruity, flirty, and just the right kind of extra.

This one's all about bright-eyed energy and breezy focus. Expect an upbeat head high, creative sparks, and the kind of mood boost that turns errands into adventures. Great for morning hikes, dance breaks, or just vibing through your day with a grin.

Bold flavor, sunshine-fueled feels."

products.name: Blue Raspberry Rush AIO
products.description:
"Your sweet escape starts here. Blue Raspberry Rush is a flavor-packed indica that hits like a slushie-fueled joyride through a blueberry field at dusk. Bursting with tangy blue raspberry, hints of candied citrus, and a smooth, icy finish—it’s nostalgic, juicy, and just the right kind of weird.

This vape doesn’t just taste like summer vacation—it feels like it. Expect a wave of full-body calm, mellow giggles, and a soft mental fog that turns “doing nothing” into an art form. Perfect for movie marathons, post-dinner wind-downs, or simply vibing with your favorite blanket.

Bold flavor, unapologetically chill feels."

products.name: Grape Galaxy AIO
products.description:
"Your chill zone just got an upgrade. Grape Galaxy is a knockout indica with big fruity flavor and even bigger couch vibes—bursting with juicy grape, tangy berry, and a hint of interstellar candy funk. It’s like sipping purple soda at a space disco… while wrapped in a weighted blanket.

This one's all about slowing your roll. Expect deep body relaxation, hazy headspace, and the kind of mellow mood that makes reruns feel like cinematic masterpieces. Sweet, silly, and seriously smooth.

Bold flavor, zero gravity feels."

products.name: Melon Breeze AIO
products.description:
"Your mellow moment in a vape. Melon Breeze is a tropical hybrid that tastes like a beach day in a bottle—ripe honeydew, splash of cantaloupe, and a cool citrus twist that’s basically a fruit smoothie with a rebellious streak. It’s crisp, refreshing, and just weird enough to keep things fun.

The vibes? Easygoing and uplifted with a smooth body buzz that keeps you grounded while your brain floats somewhere breezy. Perfect for park hangs, creative tangents, or pretending your couch is a hammock.

Bold flavor, sun-soaked feels."

products.name: Tropicana Cookies Cartridge
products.description:
Ease into the elevating euphoria of Tropicana Cookies. Feel your happiest and most creative
with this heady hybrid. Sour citrus and sweet cookie notes blend with aromas of earthy pine to
create a strain that is as delicious as it is deep.

products.name: Northern Lights Cartridge
products.description:
Revered for its tranquilizing effects and alluring aroma, Northern Lights is an obvious choice for
those seeking relaxation and serenity. A blend of earthy pine and sweet undertones fills the air,
offering a preview of the comforting experience to come. Close your eyes, inhale, and let the
soothing scent transport you to a place of calm. This Indica offers a gentle euphoria that opens
the door to creative contemplation or simply unwinding after a long day.

products.name: Dreamland AIO
products.description: Introducing Dreamland , a Sativa strain that unfolds like a vibrant narrative of tingling and uplifting effects, transforming you into a social butterfly. An All-in-One Vape, is more than a product—it's a limited-reserve treasure crafted for cannabis connoisseurs chasing an extraordinary experience. Our Everyday Rx line invites you to elevate your everyday with the best because, in our world, every day should be nothing short of exceptional.
